description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a dark, matte finish and angular contours. The main body is robust, with a prominent upper receiver and a large, detachable box magazine. The stock is ergonomic and integrated into the rear of the weapon, providing a comfortable grip and stable shoulder support. A raised sighting system is mounted on top, likely for enhanced targeting accuracy, and the barrel is short and thick, suggesting a compact, urban-oriented firearm. The surface appears to be constructed primarily from metal with some polymer components, giving it both durability and reduced weight. A small cylindrical object, possibly a muzzle device or accessory, is shown detached near the rifle.
description: A modern, dark-finished tactical rifle with an ergonomic stock, detachable box magazine, and raised sighting system. The design is compact and angular, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front and partial top view showing the barrel opening, sight mount, and the overall width of the rifle.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length, detachable box magazine, ergonomic stock, and raised sighting system.
description_view_2: Rear and partial top view displaying the back of the stock, sight mount, and the magazine well.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the rifle's angular body, magazine, and grip details.
